params.name: Phoenix Feather
params.source: Evolution Chest (0.01%), Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.06%)
params.description: On Apr 22, 3600 BC, the Phoenix reached Nirvana, leaving only one gold feather. A phoenix is reborn every five hundred years. In this process, its feathers emit sparks until it bursts into a raging inferno. Flames engulf its body until it burns to ashes. Rising from these ashes, it's reborn, continuing an eternal cycle. But once it fails to be reborn, it will die. Unfortunately, this phoenix didn't make it, leaving behind only a single feather.
